id.description: The unique version 4 UUID identifier for the specialist.

url.description: The official website URL of the specialist.

slug.description: A unique, URL-friendly string representation of the specialist's name.

name.description: The official name of the specialist or organization.

email.description: The primary contact email address for the specialist.

telephone.description: The contact phone number of the specialist in international E.164 format.

description.description: A high-level summary or tagline for the specialist.

image.description: Metadata for the primary cover image representing the specialist.

id.description: The unique version 4 UUID for the image record.

slug.description: A URL-friendly representation of the image title or name.

name.description: The display name or title of the image.

description.description: Alt text or a detailed description of the image content.

languages.description: An array of ISO 639-1 two-letter codes representing the languages supported by the specialist.

coverage.description: An array of geographic flows indicating where services originate from and their target destination. Use 'global' for global or non-specific origin/target.

from.description: The slug of the source country or 'global'.

to.description: The slug of the target country or 'global'.

services.description: A list of specific services offered by the specialist.

id.description: A unique version 4 UUID for the specific service.

slug.description: A URL-friendly representation of the service name.

name.description: the display name of the service.

description.description: A detailed description of what the service entails.

category.description: The standardized category the service falls under.

enum.name: Legal & Immigration
enum.description: Visa processing, residency applications, citizenship by investment, and general legal counsel.

enum.name: Tax & Financial Planning
enum.description: Cross-border tax optimization, filing tax returns, pension transfers, and international wealth management.

enum.name: Real Estate & Housing
enum.description: Buyer's agents, property management, rental scouting, and real estate legal support.

enum.name: Healthcare & Insurance
enum.description: International private medical insurance brokers, local health system enrollment, and medical tourism facilitators.

enum.name: Relocation & Logistics
enum.description: International moving companies, pet relocation services, and vehicle importation.

enum.name: Banking & Currency
enum.description: Foreign exchange brokers, assistance opening local bank accounts, and cross-border payment solutions.

enum.name: Settling In & Integration
enum.description: Utility setup, driver's license conversion, language schools, and destination management.

overview.description: A synthesized research write-up about the specialist, including source materials.

title.description: The main title of the overview.

subtitle.description: A descriptive subtitle for the overview.

summary.description: A brief executive summary of the research findings.

created.description: The date the overview was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD).

contents.description: The narrative paragraphs of the overview.

title.description: The heading for this section of the overview.

subtitle.description: An optional subheading for this section.

body.description: The text content of the paragraph.

sources.description: An array of external resources used to compile this overview.

id.description: The unique version 4 UUID for the source.

url.description: The direct link to the external source.

slug.description: A URL-friendly identifier for the source.

name.description: The name or title of the source.

description.description: A summary of the source's content.

copy.description: An exact text excerpt or data point retrieved from the source.

platform.description: A unique identifier for the host platform of the source. Default to the domain of the platform
